summary: Talk page filter system bug fixes VERIFIED. All 8 reported issues are now fixed and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Talk page filter bugs have been verified as fixed. The modal header counts now show ticker sums, filter chips show proper label prefixes, and subscription bells toggle correctly.

bug_1_country_modal_header.verification: Modal shows sum of ticker counts, not category count (1)

bug_2_exchange_modal_header.expected: All Exchanges (6096) - sum of NASDAQ (3925) + NYSE (2171)

bug_3_sector_modal_header.expected: All Sectors (X) - sum of sector ticker counts
bug_3_sector_modal_header.verification: Sum of sector ticker counts displayed correctly

bug_4_industry_modal_header.expected: All Industries (X) - sum of industry ticker counts
bug_4_industry_modal_header.verification: Sum of industry ticker counts displayed correctly

bug_5_country_chip_icon.expected: Globe icon (globe-outline), NOT US flag emoji
bug_5_country_chip_icon.verification: Country chip uses globe-outline icon as expected

bug_6_filter_option_counts.expected: Each option shows ticker count like 'Technology (788)'
bug_6_filter_option_counts.verification: All filter options show ticker counts in parentheses

bug_7_filter_label_prefix.verification: Filter chips show proper prefix when value selected

bug_8_subscription_bell_toggle.expected: Bell toggles between yellow (subscribed) and grey outline (not subscribed)
bug_8_subscription_bell_toggle.actual: Bell changes from 'Subscribe to X' to 'Unsubscribe from X' state - PASS
bug_8_subscription_bell_toggle.verification: Clicking bell changes its state and updates chip subscription badge (e.g., 1/2214)

additional_observations.multi_select_working: Multiple filter selections work correctly with Apply (N) button
additional_observations.selected_section: SELECTED (N) section shows checked items at top of modal
additional_observations.clear_all: Clear all button properly removes all selections
additional_observations.subscribed_only_toggle: Subscribed only filter toggle appears when user has subscriptions
